cases.name: declaration-review
cases.prompt: Review a declaration file that uses String, any callback returns, optional callback params, and broad overloads.
assertions: recommends void for ignored callback returns
orders or replaces overloads with optionals/unions where appropriate

cases.name: ci-type-gate
cases.prompt: Add a TypeScript check to CI before deploy.
assertions: uses tsc --noEmit or package script equivalent
uses the repository package manager install mode

cases.name: ci-speed-review
cases.prompt: Our TypeScript CI is too slow in a monorepo.
assertions: separates type-check from emit where relevant
recommends project references and tsc -b for multi-package repos
mentions .tsbuildinfo caching and safe cache keys
calls out skipLibCheck tradeoff instead of treating it as free

cases.name: precommit-speed
cases.prompt: Make pre-commit checks faster without removing type safety.
assertions: keeps type checking instead of dropping it blindly
warns that slow hooks lead to bypassing
